childhood.familyBackground: Born 1963. Swedish entrepreneur with manufacturing background.
childhood.earlyLife: Started in manufacturing sector combining Asian production expertise with Western management.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 아시아 생산 전문성과 서방 경영을 결합한 제조 부문에서 시작.

careerTimeline.event: Founded SHL Group combining Taiwan manufacturing with Western management
careerTimeline.eventKo: 대만 제조와 서방 경영을 결합하여 SHL Group 설립

careerTimeline.event: SHL Group evolved into SHL Medical
SHL Medical became world's largest autoinjector manufacturer
careerTimeline.eventKo: SHL Medical이 세계 최대 자동 주입기 제조사가 됨

careerTimeline.event: SHL Medical operates globally with 5,000 employees serving major pharmaceutical companies
careerTimeline.eventKo: SHL Medical이 주요 제약 회사를 지원하는 5,000명의 직원으로 글로벌 운영

personalTraits.knownFor: Building SHL Medical into global autoinjector leader, drug delivery device innovation
personalTraits.knownForKo: SHL Medical을 글로벌 자동 주입기 리더로 구축, 약물 전달 기기 혁신
